meta.reference: IT-Praxis Dr. Bauer / Die Chroniken des IT-Wikingers

clips.title: Der 47. Loop
clips.prompt: Cinematic medium shot, warm office lighting, shallow depth of field. A tired software developer with messy hair sits at a desk with three monitors showing scrolling green terminal output. He mutters exhaustedly in German: 'Das ist jetzt der 47. Loop... und James sagt immer noch NEIN.' A colleague leans in with a coffee mug and says dryly: 'Hast du esc() vergessen?' Developer's face drops. Film grain, anamorphic lens flare, blue-orange color grading. Sound: keyboard stops, dramatic silence, quiet sigh.

clips.title: Loop Inception
clips.prompt: Cinematic overhead shot looking down at a developer surrounded by notebooks and energy drink cans. Multiple monitors show nested terminal windows, each running a loop inside a loop. He whispers in German: 'Ein Loop im Loop im Loop... ich bin in Phase 3 gefangen.' He looks up at the camera with hollow eyes. Sound: echoing keyboard typing, distant server hum, clock ticking.

clips.title: Der SPAWN Moment
clips.prompt: Dramatic slow-motion cinematic shot. A developer dramatically hits ENTER on a glowing mechanical keyboard. Green text explodes across the screen: 'SPAWNING NEW INSTANCE...' His face is illuminated by the green glow. He whispers reverently: 'Frischer Kontext... endlich kein Context Drift mehr.' Camera pushes in slowly. Sound: dramatic whoosh, electronic boot-up sequence, triumphant chord.

clips.title: VERIFY Fails Again
clips.prompt: Medium shot of a developer staring at a red terminal screen showing 'VERIFY: FAILED - 23 errors'. He slowly turns to the camera and says flatly in German: 'Der Reviewer hat wieder alles rot markiert. Alles. Sogar die Kommentare.' He drops his head on the desk. Sound: error buzzer, sad trombone, keyboard face-plant.

clips.title: COMMIT oder Nicht
clips.prompt: Cinematic close-up of trembling fingers hovering over ENTER key. Terminal shows 'git commit -m feat(dashboard): komplett neu geschrieben'. A voice whispers: 'Wenn du jetzt committst... gibt es kein Zurück.' Developer swallows hard, pushes button. Screen flashes green: 'COMMITTED.' Relief washes over his face. Sound: heartbeat, dramatic pause, triumphant ding.

clips.title: Context Drift Panik
clips.prompt: Handheld shaky-cam shot of a panicked developer scrolling through a massive chat history. He mutters frantically: 'Wo war ich? Was wollte ich bauen? Wer bin ich?' A colleague walks by and says calmly: 'Du brauchst einen frischen Spawn, Alter.' Camera stabilizes as realization hits. Sound: panicked breathing, scrolling sounds, calming chime.

clips.title: Nachtschicht Loop
clips.prompt: Dark cinematic shot of an office at 3 AM, only lit by monitor glow. Empty energy drink cans everywhere. A developer types intensely, dark circles under his eyes. He mumbles: 'Noch ein Loop... noch ein Task... noch ein...' He falls asleep mid-sentence, face hitting keyboard. The terminal shows: 'LOOP COMPLETE.' Sound: quiet night ambience, slow keyboard tapping, snoring.

clips.title: Der Perfekte Loop
clips.prompt: Bright, clean cinematic shot. A developer leans back triumphantly. All three monitors show green checkmarks. He announces proudly: 'LESEN, SPAWN, EXECUTE, VERIFY, COMMIT, LOOP — sechs Phasen, null Fehler!' A notification pops up: 'New task assigned.' His smile fades. Sound: victory fanfare, then sad notification ding.

clips.title: Loop Dashboard Live
clips.prompt: Wide cinematic shot of a futuristic control room. A massive screen shows the Ralph-Loop Dashboard with live metrics: loops running, tasks completed, commits pushed. An operator narrates: 'System 2 Koordination läuft stabil. 847 Loops abgeschlossen, null Context Drift.' Sound: ambient electronic hum, data processing sounds, subtle beeping.

clips.title: Emergency SPAWN
clips.prompt: Action movie style cinematic shot. Red emergency lights flash. A developer slams a big red button labeled 'EMERGENCY SPAWN'. Screens restart with fresh terminals. He yells: 'Context overflow! Frischer Kontext, JETZT!' Everything goes green again. Sound: alarm sirens, dramatic button press, systems rebooting, calm restored.

clips.title: James sagt NEIN
clips.prompt: Cinematic close-up of a curved monitor showing blinking red 'R24 ALARM'. Red light pulses across a developer's panicked face. A deep robotic voice says: 'ARCHIV-ALARM. Sie wollten eine Datei löschen. Warte auf Bestätigung von 777.' Developer whispers: 'Ich wollte nur die console.logs entfernen...' Film noir, high contrast. Sound: ominous bass, alert beeping.

clips.title: Guardian Watching
clips.prompt: Eerie cinematic shot from security camera perspective, slightly fish-eye. James Guardian's interface glows blue in a dark server room, scanning code on multiple screens. Text appears: 'SCANNING... esc() MISSING IN LINE 47.' A red highlight pulses. Robotic voice: 'Violation detected. Developer notified.' Sound: scanning sounds, warning tone, mechanical whir.

clips.title: Constitution Check
clips.prompt: Dramatic courtroom-style cinematic shot. James Guardian's holographic face appears on a large screen, acting as judge. A nervous developer stands before it. James says sternly: 'Artikel 3: Kein jQuery ohne Rücksprache. Sie haben jQuery importiert.' Developer stammers: 'Das war nur für... einen Selector...' Sound: gavel bang, tense music.

clips.title: R24 False Alarm
clips.prompt: Comedic cinematic scene. Entire office in panic mode — papers flying, people running. A developer checks the alert: 'R24 ALARM: Datei desktop.ini verschoben.' He announces to the room: 'Fehlalarm! James hat nur eine System-Datei gesehen.' Everyone freezes mid-panic. Awkward silence. Sound: alarm, chaos, then abrupt silence, cricket chirp.

clips.title: James Goes Dark
clips.prompt: Horror-style cinematic shot. All screens in the office suddenly go black. Then one by one, they light up showing: 'JAMES GUARDIAN: OFFLINE.' Developers look at each other in terror. One whispers: 'Ohne James... wer überwacht die Regeln?' Sound: power down sequence, eerie silence, heartbeat.

clips.title: Guardian Reboot
clips.prompt: Epic cinematic wide shot. A massive server room with blinking lights. An admin types a command: 'sudo systemctl restart james-guardian'. Lights cascade across the room as systems come online. James voice returns: 'Guardian aktiv. 29 Regeln geladen. Bereit.' Sound: boot sequence, cascading beeps, triumphant orchestral swell.

clips.title: Nachts im Serverraum
clips.prompt: Atmospheric cinematic shot of a dimly lit server room at night. Blue LED lights blink rhythmically. James Guardian's holographic avatar patrols between server racks, scanning each one. Voice narrates: 'Mitternacht-Scan. 89 Module. 34 Shared Scripts. Null Anomalien.' Sound: server hum, footstep-like sounds, quiet electronic scanning.

clips.title: Double Agent Alarm
clips.prompt: Thriller-style cinematic shot. Split screen: two developers typing simultaneously. James Guardian detects: 'WARNUNG: Zwei Agenten editieren dasselbe Modul!' Red lines connect the two screens. Both developers slowly look up at each other across the office. Sound: tension strings, dual keyboard typing, warning klaxon.

clips.title: James lernt dazu
clips.prompt: Warm cinematic shot. James Guardian's interface shows a new rule being added: 'REGEL 30: Dual-Database Pflicht.' The screen glows gold briefly. James voice says warmly: 'Neue Weisheit aufgenommen. Ich werde sie beschützen.' A developer smiles at the screen. Sound: gentle chime, writing sound, warm electronic tone.

clips.title: Der Letzte Wächter
clips.prompt: Epic cinematic shot at sunset, light streaming through office windows onto a single monitor running James Guardian. Voice narrates dramatically: 'Wenn alle anderen schlafen... wenn der letzte Commit gepusht ist... wacht James. Immer.' Screen shows: '0 violations. System: PERFECT.' Sound: sunset ambience, gentle wind, heroic theme.

clips.title: 89 und kein Ende
clips.prompt: Epic cinematic drone shot over a massive control room with dozens of glowing monitors in a curved wall, each showing a different dashboard with dark backgrounds and neon accents. An admin walks through holding coffee. He narrates: '89 Module... alle portable... alle vanilla... kein React, kein Vue...' Takes a sip: 'Perfektion.' Sound: server hum, footsteps, coffee sip.

clips.title: Modul 90 geboren
clips.prompt: Cinematic time-lapse of code being written on a dark terminal. Lines appear rapidly. A new folder structure materializes: 'modules/modul-90/'. The developer announces: 'Modul 90 ist live. Features.json aktualisiert. REGISTRY synchron.' Confetti animation on screen. Sound: rapid typing, build process, celebration ding.

clips.title: Das Portable Prinzip
clips.prompt: Clean cinematic shot of a USB stick being plugged into a laptop. A single HTML file opens — completely styled, fully functional dashboard module. Developer explains: 'Ein Modul. Eine Datei. Kein Build. Kein Webpack. Öffne es überall.' The module works perfectly offline. Sound: USB plug sound, browser opening, satisfied hum.

clips.title: Feature Registry
clips.prompt: Cinematic close-up of a developer's hands editing features.json on a mechanical keyboard. Each keystroke adds a new feature entry with status, version, and tags. The file grows methodically. He murmurs: 'Jedes Feature dokumentiert. Jedes. Einzelne.' Sound: precise keyboard clicks, JSON formatting sounds, completion chime.

clips.title: BLAUPAUSE Update
clips.prompt: Architectural style cinematic shot. A developer stands before a massive whiteboard covered in module diagrams and connections. He adds module 91 to the blueprint with a marker. Steps back, surveys the entire ecosystem map. Says quietly: 'Das Ökosystem wächst.' Sound: marker on whiteboard, contemplative music, camera shutter.

clips.title: Shared Script Magic
clips.prompt: Cinematic split-screen showing 6 different modules simultaneously. Each one loads the same shared script — dkz-navbar.js. Navigation menus appear in perfect sync across all screens. Developer narrates: '34 Shared Scripts. Einmal schreiben. 89 mal nutzen.' Sound: synchronized loading sounds, harmonic chime, code execution beep.

clips.title: Das Vanilla Manifest
clips.prompt: Dramatic cinematic shot of a developer giving a presentation to an empty auditorium. Slide shows: 'NO FRAMEWORKS - Our Manifesto.' He gestures passionately: 'Vanilla JavaScript. CSS Custom Properties. HTML5. Das ist alles was wir brauchen.' Camera slowly zooms out revealing the empty seats. Sound: echo in room, projector hum, dramatic pause.

clips.title: CSS Variable Orchestra
clips.prompt: Artistic cinematic shot. A developer changes one CSS variable: --accent: #fa1e4e. Instantly, 89 modules update their accent color simultaneously. A cascade of color changes flows across a grid of module previews. He whispers: 'Eine Variable ändert alles.' Sound: orchestral note, cascading chimes, satisfying click.

clips.title: Registry Sync
clips.prompt: Action-style cinematic shot. REGISTRY.json opens on screen showing all 89 module entries. A developer runs a sync command — green checkmarks cascade down the list. '89 of 89 modules verified. All portable. All compliant.' Sound: rapid verification beeps, progress bar sound, final success horn.

clips.title: Module Museum
clips.prompt: Atmospheric cinematic tracking shot through a virtual museum gallery. Each 'painting' on the wall is a module screenshot in an ornate frame. A visitor walks through admiring them: 'WissenHub... BotNet... NanoBot... jedes ein Kunstwerk.' The gallery stretches infinitely. Sound: footsteps on marble, gentle classical music, awe.

clips.title: BotNet Markttag
clips.prompt: Cinematic establishing shot of a futuristic neon-lit underground marketplace, cyberpunk aesthetic. Holographic screens display AI agent profiles and karma scores. A vendor calls out: 'Frische Agenten! CodeRabbit, gerade geschlüpft! Karma 9.8!' A buyer in sunglasses whispers: 'Ich nehme den James Guardian.' Blade Runner lighting. Sound: electronic music, crowd murmur, hologram buzz.

clips.title: Karma Auktion
clips.prompt: Cinematic auction house scene, dramatic lighting. An auctioneer stands before floating holographic agent cards. 'NanoBot Prime, Karma-Score 9.95! Wer bietet?' Bidders raise glowing paddles. 'Verkauft an den Entwickler in Reihe 7!' Sound: auctioneer voice, electronic bidding sounds, sold hammer.

clips.title: Agent Showdown
clips.prompt: Cinematic arena shot, neon-lit fighting ring. Two AI agent holograms face off: CodeRabbit vs NanoBot. Stats float beside them. An announcer declares: 'Code-Review Battle! Wer findet mehr Bugs?' Both agents scan code simultaneously. Results flash: 'CodeRabbit: 23 Bugs. NanoBot: 24 Bugs.' Sound: crowd roar, scanning sounds, victory bell.

clips.title: DAC Protokoll
clips.prompt: Mysterious cinematic shot in a dark room. A hooded figure examines a holographic DAC protocol diagram floating in the air. Complex flowcharts and agent handshake animations glow blue. Voice whispers: 'Das DAC-Protokoll ist der Schlüssel. Dezentrale Agent-Kommunikation.' Sound: mysterious electronic tones, data transmission sounds.

clips.title: Marketplace Nacht
clips.prompt: Moody cinematic wide shot of the BotNet marketplace at closing time. Vendors pack up holographic displays. Neon signs flicker off one by one. A lone buyer walks through empty stalls, coat collar up. She mutters: 'Morgen kommen neue Agenten. Bessere.' Rain begins to fall. Sound: neon buzzing off, rain starting, lonely footsteps.

clips.title: Agent Upgrade
clips.prompt: Cinematic close-up of a holographic agent card being upgraded. Old stats dissolve, new ones materialize: Karma 7.2 becomes 9.1, skills expand. The owner watches proudly: 'Sechs Monate Training. Jetzt ist er bereit.' The upgraded agent glows brighter. Sound: upgrade chime cascade, power-up sound, satisfied exhale.

clips.title: Schwarzmarkt Agent
clips.prompt: Dark cinematic scene in a back alley. Shady figure offers a glowing red agent card. Buyer examines it suspiciously. 'Dieser Agent... hat keine esc() Funktion.' Buyer recoils in horror: 'Ohne XSS-Schutz? Bist du wahnsinnig?' Sound: noir jazz, whispered dialogue, dramatic gasp.

clips.title: Agent Kindergarten
clips.prompt: Cute cinematic shot of a bright training room. Tiny holographic agent avatars learn basic tasks: one tries to format JSON, another practices git commits. A trainer watches fondly: 'Sie lernen so schnell. Nächste Woche: Shared Scripts.' One mini-agent crashes. Sound: playful music, tiny error beeps, gentle laugh.

clips.title: Karma Reset
clips.prompt: Dramatic cinematic shot. A developer stares at the screen showing an agent with Karma 0.0, marked red. He says grimly: 'Er hat eine Datei aus 99_ARCHIVE gelöscht. Sein Karma... ist Geschichte.' The agent card shatters into digital fragments. Sound: glass breaking, error tone, somber music.

clips.title: Agent Graduation
clips.prompt: Warm cinematic ceremony scene. Holographic agents float above a stage, each wearing tiny digital graduation caps. Names scroll: 'CodeRabbit v3... NanoBot Prime... Copilot Suggest...' A proud creator claps: 'Geht raus und findet Bugs!' Sound: graduation march, applause, confetti pop.

clips.title: Immutable Knowledge
clips.prompt: Cinematic shot of a vast underground ice cave, blue-lit crystalline structures. Each ice crystal contains a glowing document — walkthroughs, plans, blueprints. A narrator's voice echoes: 'Iceberg Archive. Einmal gespeichert, niemals gelöscht. 225 Artefakte. Immutable.' Camera slowly rises through the cave. Sound: ice cave ambience, crystalline chimes.

clips.title: Dreifach Verankerung
clips.prompt: Cinematic split into three panels. Left: Iceberg archive with documents descending into deep blue. Center: Hub interface with searchable cards. Right: Copilot glowing and answering queries. Narrator: 'Dreifach verankert. Iceberg. Hub. Copilot. Nichts geht verloren.' Panels merge into one. Sound: three distinct tones harmonizing, data flow sounds.

clips.title: Catalog Update
clips.prompt: Cinematic close-up of catalog.json being updated. New entries materialize as golden text: type, tags, date, module. Each entry links to a document in the archive. Developer whispers: '76 Conversations. 59 Plans. 46 Walkthroughs.' The catalog pulses with life. Sound: writing sounds, golden shimmer, heartbeat-like pulse.

clips.title: Wiki Hub Panorama
clips.prompt: Epic cinematic panorama showing the Wiki Hub interface — 4121 entries arranged as a glowing tree structure. 9 source branches expand into thousands of nodes. Camera flies through the knowledge tree. Narrator: 'Vier-tausend-einhundert-einundzwanzig Einträge. Ein Wissensbaum.' Sound: wind through digital leaves, data sparkle.

clips.title: Research Deep Dive
clips.prompt: Submarine-style cinematic shot. A researcher descends through layers of data visualized as ocean depths. Research papers float like jellyfish. '225 Artefakte aus 91 Sessions. Jedes einzelne abrufbar.' She reaches the bottom where the oldest documents glow amber. Sound: deep ocean ambience, sonar pings, pressure sounds.

clips.title: Context Pipeline
clips.prompt: Cinematic visualization of data flowing through pipes. James Guardian stands at a junction, directing documents to the right channels. 'Task Tags analysieren. Relevantes injizieren. Rest in Iceberg.' Only glowing relevant docs pass through. The rest descend into cold storage. Sound: pipeline whoosh, sorting mechanism, efficient hum.

clips.title: Master Index
clips.prompt: Cinematic shot of a developer scrolling through master-index.json — thousands of entries. Each one a link to knowledge. He searches: 'esc()' — 47 results. 'Ralph-Loop' — 89 results. He smiles: 'Das System vergisst nichts.' Sound: search whoosh, results appearing, satisfied hum.

clips.title: Archiv Archaeology
clips.prompt: Indiana Jones style cinematic shot. A developer in a fedora explores 99_ARCHIVE with a flashlight. Ancient code files from 2024 line the shelves. He brushes dust off a file: 'Das erste Modul... noch mit jQuery.' He shudders. Places it back carefully: 'Niemals löschen.' Sound: adventure theme, dust, reverent silence.

clips.title: Sync Storm
clips.prompt: Action cinematic shot. Multiple databases sync simultaneously — WissenHub, Research Archive, master-index, catalog.json. Data streams converge in a hurricane of information. An admin orchestrates: 'Dual-Database Sync in 3... 2... 1... SYNC!' Everything aligns perfectly. Sound: data storm, countdown, synchronized beep.

clips.title: Das Vergessen Verboten
clips.prompt: Philosophical cinematic shot. An empty desk. A single monitor shows: 'KEIN LÖSCHEN — Daten sind immutable.' Camera slowly zooms out revealing walls covered in post-it notes, printouts, diagrams. Narrator: 'In DEVKiTZ vergisst man nicht. Man archiviert.' Sound: contemplative piano, paper rustling, quiet determination.

clips.title: 34 Tools Online
clips.prompt: Cinematic control panel shot. ONTHERUN MCP Server dashboard lights up — 34 tool icons activate one by one in a cascade. Status indicators turn green. Admin announces: 'ONTHERUN ist online. 34 Tools bereit. Express Server läuft.' Sound: system boot cascade, green confirmation beeps, server start hum.

clips.title: API Request Storm
clips.prompt: Cinematic visualization of API requests as neon light beams shooting into a central server. OpenAI, Claude, Groq, Mistral, Gemini — five beams of different colors converging. Operator narrates: 'Fünf KI-Provider. Ein Server. Null Downtime.' Sound: energy beams, server processing, matrix-style data sounds.

clips.title: MCP Handshake
clips.prompt: Cinematic close-up of two digital hands performing a handshake — one representing the client, one the MCP server. Glowing protocol lines connect them. 'Model Context Protocol. SDK verbunden. Kanal offen.' Data begins flowing between them. Sound: connection established tone, data stream, handshake click.

clips.title: Express Highway
clips.prompt: Cinematic aerial shot of a glowing digital highway. Data packets race along Express.js routes like cars. Routes branch off: /api/chat, /api/tools, /api/files. Traffic controller oversees: 'Node 18. Express. Alle Routen aktiv.' Sound: highway ambience, data whoosh, traffic control beeps.

clips.title: Server Mitternacht
clips.prompt: Atmospheric cinematic shot of a server rack at midnight. LED lights blink in patterns. A lone admin monitors ONTHERUN logs scrolling on a green terminal. He says quietly: '3 AM. 247 Requests heute. Kein einziger Fehler.' Takes a sip of coffee. Sound: quiet server room, scrolling text, coffee sip.

clips.title: Tool Registry
clips.prompt: Cinematic shot of a developer browsing the MCP tool registry. Each tool is displayed as a glowing card: 'file-reader', 'code-executor', 'git-manager'. He selects one — it expands showing parameters and examples. 'Wie ein Werkzeugkasten. Aber intelligent.' Sound: card selection sounds, tool activation, admiring whistle.

clips.title: Graceful Degradation
clips.prompt: Cinematic scene showing a dashboard with traffic-light indicators. One by one, external APIs go yellow then red: 'GitHub: OFFLINE. OpenAI: DEGRADED.' But the dashboard keeps running, adapting. Admin nods: 'Graceful Degradation. Das System überlebt alles.' Sound: warning tones descending, then confident heartbeat.

clips.title: Hot Reload
clips.prompt: Speed-focused cinematic shot. Developer saves a file — instantly the server restarts in 0.3 seconds. Browser auto-refreshes showing updated module. He snaps his fingers: 'Express Hot Reload. Keine Wartezeit. Kein Build.' Everything is instant. Sound: save click, lightning-fast reload, snap.

clips.title: Localhost 3000
clips.prompt: Retro cinematic shot, VHS aesthetic. A developer types 'localhost:3000' into the browser address bar. The ONTHERUN dashboard emerges from static, perfectly styled. He stares in awe: 'Das ist lokal. Das braucht kein Internet.' The page loads instantly. Sound: VHS static, dial-up nostalgia, instant load chime.

clips.title: Server Absturz
clips.prompt: Horror cinematic shot. ONTHERUN server crashes — all screens go red. Error messages cascade. Developers freeze. Then... auto-restart kicks in. Screens come back green in 5 seconds. Admin says coolly: 'Resilience. Eingebaut seit Tag eins.' Sound: crash sound, silence, triumphant reboot sequence.

clips.title: Morning Standup
clips.prompt: Bright cinematic shot of a morning standup meeting. Holographic task boards float around the team. Each person reports: 'Gestern: 3 Module. Heute: Feature Flags. Blocker: Keiner.' The scrum master nods: 'Sprint-Velocity bei 42. Weiter so.' Sound: morning ambience, coffee pouring, productive murmur.

clips.title: Der Erste Commit
clips.prompt: Nostalgic cinematic shot, warm lighting. Flashback to the very first git commit of DEVKiTZ. Date: 'initial commit — DEVKiTZ Dashboard v0.1.' A young developer hits enter, screen glows. Cut to present: 89 modules, thousands of commits. Voice: 'Es hat mit einer Datei angefangen.' Sound: nostalgic music, keyboard, emotional swell.

clips.title: Kaffee und Code
clips.prompt: Cozy cinematic shot. Close-up of espresso being poured, steam rising. Camera pulls back revealing a developer's desk: dual monitors with code, mechanical keyboard, plants. He sips, types, sips again. Murmurs: 'Der beste Code entsteht zwischen dem zweiten und dritten Kaffee.' Sound: espresso machine, keyboard rhythm, satisfied sigh.

clips.title: Git Blame Drama
clips.prompt: Dramatic courtroom cinematic shot. A developer points at git blame output on a big screen: 'HIER! Zeile 47! Letzter Commit: DU!' The accused developer stands up slowly: 'Das war ein Hotfix um 3 Uhr morgens.' Judge James intervenes: 'Freigesprochen. Aber nächstes Mal: Code Review.' Sound: courtroom tension, accusation, gavel.

clips.title: Hackathon Night
clips.prompt: Energetic cinematic montage. Developers code frantically at a hackathon. Energy drinks, pizza boxes, whiteboards full of diagrams. Clock shows midnight, then 2 AM, then 4 AM. Final shot: triumphant team with a working prototype on screen. 'Modul 92... in einer Nacht gebaut.' Sound: electronic music, intense typing, victory shout.

clips.title: Design System Review
clips.prompt: Artistic cinematic shot. A designer reviews the DkZ Design System on a 4K monitor. Color swatches glow: #fa1e4e, #060608, #00ff88. Font specimens: Inter, JetBrains Mono. She says approvingly: 'Konsistent. Über 89 Module. Kein einziger Hardcoded Wert.' Sound: zen music, color selection sounds, approval hum.

clips.title: Pair Programming
clips.prompt: Intimate cinematic two-shot. Two developers share one keyboard, passing it back and forth. One writes a function, the other adds esc() sanitization. 'Du vergisst den XSS-Schutz.' 'Stimmt. esc() eingefügt.' Fist bump. Sound: collaborative typing, dialogue, knuckle tap.

clips.title: Der Bug um 3 Uhr
clips.prompt: Horror-comedy cinematic shot. 3 AM, dark office, single desk lamp. A developer finds a bug: a missing semicolon. He stares in disbelief: 'Drei Stunden... für ein Semikolon.' He adds it. Everything works. He laughs maniacally. Sound: horror ambient, realization silence, manic laughter.

clips.title: Remote Standup
clips.prompt: Modern cinematic shot of a video call grid. Each participant has their DEVKiTZ dashboard visible behind them. One reports: 'WissenHub hat jetzt 250 Artefakte. Research Archive synchron.' Another: 'James Guardian läuft seit 72 Stunden ohne Alert.' Thumbs up emojis float. Sound: video call ambience, enthusiastic voices.

clips.title: Weekend Deploy
clips.prompt: Suspenseful cinematic shot. Sunday evening. Developer hesitates over the deploy button. Sweat on his brow. He whispers: 'Freitags deployen sie sagen... nie freitags...' Looks at calendar: 'Sonntag. Technisch okay.' Pushes button. Deployment succeeds. He collapses in relief. Sound: tension buildup, button click, success fanfare.

clips.title: Iceberg unter der Oberfläche
clips.prompt: Cinematic underwater shot. Camera descends below a calm digital ocean surface. Underneath: massive ice formations, each containing data tables and schemas. Apache Iceberg metadata glows in ice crystals. Narrator: 'Über der Oberfläche: ein Dashboard. Darunter: ein ganzer Datensee.' Sound: underwater ambience, ice creaking, data bubbles.

clips.title: DuckDB Blitz
clips.prompt: Speed cinematic shot. A query typed into DuckDB returns in 0.02 seconds. Data tables appear instantly. The developer blinks: 'Null-komma-null-zwei Sekunden. Für eine Million Zeilen.' He runs another query. Same speed. 'DuckDB versteht keine Langsamkeit.' Sound: lightning strike, instant result beep, impressed whistle.

clips.title: Schema Evolution
clips.prompt: Time-lapse cinematic shot. A data schema evolves over months: columns added, types changed, partitions reorganized. Each change is tracked in Iceberg metadata. 'Schema Evolution ohne Datenverlust. Jede Version abrufbar.' The schema transforms like a living organism. Sound: time-lapse clock, organic growth sounds, data mutation.

clips.title: Offline First
clips.prompt: Cinematic shot. Internet cable is dramatically unplugged. Dashboard stays fully functional. localStorage keeps everything running. Developer says triumphantly: 'Offline. Und alles läuft.' He continues working without a flinch. Network reconnects — sync happens seamlessly. Sound: cable unplug, confident typing, reconnection chime.

clips.title: Data Lake Sunrise
clips.prompt: Beautiful cinematic landscape shot. A vast digital lake at sunrise, data streams flowing in from multiple sources like rivers. On the shore, a data engineer watches: 'Apache Iceberg. DuckDB. localStorage. Drei Schichten. Ein See.' The lake shimmers with organized data. Sound: nature ambience, water flowing, morning birds with digital filter.

clips.title: Backup Ritual
clips.prompt: Ritualistic cinematic shot. A developer performs the daily backup: IndexedDB to localStorage, localStorage to cloud, cloud to archive. Three-step process, each confirmed with a green checkmark. 'Dreifach gesichert. Wie jeden Tag.' He closes the laptop ceremoniously. Sound: backup process sounds, three confirmation tones, laptop closing.

clips.title: Time Travel Query
clips.prompt: Sci-fi cinematic shot. Developer types 'SELECT * FROM modules AS OF TIMESTAMP 2025-06-15'. Old data materializes as holographic tables. He compares past and present side by side. 'Iceberg Time Travel. Jeder Zustand abrufbar.' Sound: time warp effect, data materialization, comparison chime.

clips.title: Partition Party
clips.prompt: Festive cinematic shot. Data tables celebrate as they get partitioned into efficient structures. Holographic data cards sort themselves by date, type, and module. An admin watches: 'Partitioniert nach Datum und Typ. Queries 10x schneller.' Confetti of data fragments. Sound: sorting sounds, speed boost whoosh, party popper.

clips.title: ETL Pipeline
clips.prompt: Industrial cinematic shot. Raw data enters a glowing pipeline on one end: messy, unstructured, chaotic. It passes through extraction, transformation, loading stages. Emerges on the other end: clean, structured, beautiful. 'Von Chaos zu Ordnung. Automatisch.' Sound: factory conveyor, processing hums, clean output chime.

clips.title: Catalog Manifest
clips.prompt: Library cinematic shot. Ancient-looking catalog drawers open to reveal digital entries. Each card contains document metadata: type, tags, date, status. A librarian-developer files a new entry: 'Noch ein Walkthrough für die Ewigkeit.' The catalog glows. Sound: drawer opening, card filing, golden glow tone.

clips.title: Copilot erwacht
clips.prompt: Cinematic boot-up shot. dkz-copilot.js initializes. A friendly glowing orb appears on screen, pulsing blue. Text types itself: 'DkZ Copilot aktiv. Wie kann ich helfen?' Developer asks: 'Wo ist die esc-Funktion definiert?' Copilot instantly: 'shared/dkz-utils.js, Zeile 12.' Sound: warm boot chime, typing interface, instant response ding.

clips.title: Multi-Provider Party
clips.prompt: Cinematic split showing five AI providers as glowing avatars: OpenAI (green), Claude (orange), Groq (purple), Mistral (blue), Gemini (multi-color). All respond to the same query simultaneously. Results compare on screen. Developer: 'Fünf Meinungen. Eine Wahrheit.' Sound: five different AI tones, comparison whoosh.

clips.title: Prompt Template Gold
clips.prompt: Treasure chamber cinematic shot. Gold-lit vault filled with floating prompt cards. Counter shows: '344 Templates. 35 Kategorien.' A developer selects one, it expands into a perfect prompt. 'Für jede Aufgabe eine Vorlage. Handgemacht.' Sound: treasure room ambience, card selection sparkle, golden chime.

clips.title: NLM Brain Session
clips.prompt: Podcast studio cinematic shot. Two holographic speakers discuss DEVKiTZ in a NotebookLM session. 'Wusstest du, dass DEVKiTZ 89 Module hat?' 'Ohne ein einziges Framework!' They laugh. Audio waveforms pulse between them. Sound: podcast format, conversational dialogue, friendly laughter.

clips.title: Source Tag Filter
clips.prompt: Detective cinematic shot. A developer examines prompts through a magnifying glass. Tags glow: gen, arc, eng, chat, loop, import. She filters: 'Zeig mir alle engineering Prompts.' 47 results. 'Nur die vom Loop Dashboard.' 3 results. 'Perfekt.' Sound: detective music, filter click, satisfied confirmation.

clips.title: KI Meeting
clips.prompt: Boardroom cinematic shot. Five AI avatars sit around a holographic conference table. Each presents their specialty: 'Ich generiere Code.' 'Ich reviewe Code.' 'Ich schreibe Docs.' The chair (James) summarizes: 'Gemeinsam sind wir DEVKiTZ.' Sound: corporate meeting ambience, presenter voices, agreement murmur.

clips.title: Halluzination erkannt
clips.prompt: Alert cinematic shot. Copilot suggests code — but James Guardian highlights it red: 'HALLUZINATION ERKANNT. Diese API existiert nicht.' Developer sighs in relief: 'Gut, dass James aufpasst.' Copilot corrects itself. Sound: warning buzzer, error highlight, correction whoosh, relief sigh.

clips.title: Midnight Copilot
clips.prompt: Intimate cinematic shot. Late night, dark room, only Copilot's blue glow illuminates the scene. A developer asks tiredly: 'Wie war der Plan für Modul 47 nochmal?' Copilot retrieves it from Iceberg: 'Implementierungsplan vom 12. Februar. Soll ich zusammenfassen?' Sound: night ambience, keyboard, helpful AI tone.

clips.title: Training Day
clips.prompt: Montage cinematic shot. Copilot trains on DEVKiTZ documentation: BLAUPAUSE, REGELWERK, all 89 module READMEs. Knowledge bar fills: 10%... 50%... 99%... 100%. It announces: 'Training abgeschlossen. Ich kenne jetzt jede Regel, jedes Modul, jeden Prompt.' Sound: loading progress, data ingestion, completion fanfare.

clips.title: Emergency Context
clips.prompt: Rescue cinematic shot. Developer lost in complex codebase, panic rising. Copilot activates emergency mode — highlights relevant files, shows connected modules, pulls up the last walkthrough. 'Alles gefunden. Du bist hier.' Map appears. Sound: emergency activation, rapid search, calming relief tone.

clips.title: Open Source Moment
clips.prompt: Cinematic shot of a developer hovering over the 'Make Public' button on GitHub. 777/devkitz-ecosystem. 89 modules. Years of work. He hesitates, then pushes. Stars begin appearing: 1, 10, 100, 1000. Smile grows wider with each star. Sound: button press, star notification sounds accelerating, crowd cheering.

clips.title: First Pull Request
clips.prompt: Heartwarming cinematic shot. A notification appears: 'New Pull Request from community-dev-42.' The PR adds a new module. Developer 777 reviews it, eyes widening: 'Sie haben esc() benutzt. DkZ CSS Variables. Shared Scripts.' He approves immediately, wiping a proud tear. Sound: notification, code review sounds, emotional music.

clips.title: Conference Talk
clips.prompt: Cinematic stage shot. Developer presents DEVKiTZ at a tech conference. Massive screen behind: '89 Modules. Zero Frameworks. One Vision.' Audience gasps. Q&A: 'Really no React?' Developer smiles: 'Really no React.' Standing ovation begins. Sound: conference ambience, presentation, crowd reaction, applause.

clips.title: Das Manifest 2026
clips.prompt: Philosophical cinematic shot. Black screen, white text appears word by word: 'Wir glauben... an Vanilla. An Portabilität. An Wissen, das nicht vergessen wird.' Each line pulses with accent color. Final line: 'DEVKiTZ - Das Developer Ökosystem.' Sound: minimalist piano, text appearing sounds, final chord.

clips.title: Version 2.0
clips.prompt: Epic cinematic shot. Countdown on massive screen: 3... 2... 1... 'DEVKiTZ 2.0 RELEASED.' Fireworks explode (digital). Changelog scrolls: 89 modules, 34 shared scripts, 225 artefacts, 7 BMAD agents. Developer watches fireworks reflect in their glasses. Sound: countdown, explosion, celebration, epic music.

clips.title: Global Dashboard
clips.prompt: Cinematic globe shot. Earth viewed from space, but instead of city lights, DkZ dashboard modules glow from different countries. Lines connect them. Narrator: 'Einmal geschrieben in Bonn. Genutzt überall. Portable. Universal. Vanilla.' The globe rotates slowly. Sound: space ambience, connection sounds, world music.

clips.title: Der Nächste Entwickler
clips.prompt: Warm cinematic shot. An experienced developer sits with a young newcomer. Shows them DEVKiTZ for the first time. 'Das ist der Hub. Hier sind die Module. Und hier...' opens REGELWERK.md '...sind die Regeln.' Newcomer's eyes light up: 'Das ist... alles dokumentiert?' Sound: mentor music, awe, page turning.

clips.title: Sunset Coding
clips.prompt: Beautiful cinematic shot. Developer codes on a laptop at sunset on a rooftop. City skyline in background. Orange light on the screen showing DkZ Dashboard. A perfect evening. Last commit of the day: 'feat(life): perfekter Moment.' He closes the laptop, watches the sunset. Sound: golden hour ambience, final keystroke, peaceful music.

clips.title: Das Gesamtwerk
clips.prompt: Epic cinematic circular tracking shot around a huge holographic display showing DEVKiTZ in its entirety: all 89+ modules, every connection, every data flow, every agent. It pulses like a living organism. Narrator: 'Ein Ökosystem. Gebaut in Vanilla. Angetrieben von KI. Beschützt von James. Unsterblich durch Iceberg.' Sound: epic orchestral crescendo.

clips.title: Intro Sequenz DEVKiTZ
clips.prompt: Cinematic movie intro. Dark screen. A single red accent line draws across: #fa1e4e. Text materializes letter by letter in Inter font: 'D.E.V.K.i.T.Z.' Then the tagline fades in: 'Das Developer Ökosystem.' Background reveals: code rain in green, transforming into module icons. Final shot: the DkZ logo pulses once. Sound: cinematic bass drop, synth build, iconic logo sound.
